description_long: This sconce features a bell-shaped translucent shade with a subtle swirling texture and a decorative wavy pattern along the lower rim. The fixture is mounted on a circular base plate, connected by a short arm and a rounded joint, suggesting adjustability. The main body of the sconce is smooth and slightly frosted, diffusing light softly. There are faint floral motifs etched or painted onto the surface, adding a touch of elegance. The overall construction appears to be primarily glass or acrylic with metallic mounting hardware. The design is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban exteriors or interiors.
description: A bell-shaped translucent sconce with a wavy rim pattern, floral motifs, and a circular wall mount.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bell-shaped shade, wavy rim pattern, and faint floral motif.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled arm, circular base, and the full profile of the shade.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the circular opening and the mounting hardware connection.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arm, base, and the decorative patterns on the shade.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a minimalist yet slightly decorative design, with a frosted bell-shaped shade and subtle floral and wavy motifs, blending modern and classic influences.
